title: Sponsor your parents and grandparents - Canada.ca
content:
## Sponsor your parents and grandparents
This is a program to sponsor your parents and grandparents to become permanent residents of Canada.

## New Ministerial Instructions for the Parents and Grandparents Program come into effect January 1, 2026
These administrative steps allow us to keep processing existing applications into 2026. Details on the next intake will be shared on our website and social media channels as soon as they are available.
Starting July 28, 2025, we invited potential sponsors who submitted an interest to sponsor form in 2020 to apply for the 2025 intake.
We sent 17,860 invitations over approximately 2 weeks. Our goal is to accept 10,000 complete applications.
The last day to apply was October 9, 2025. We’re no longer accepting applications.
Closed By invitation only
Check processing times
Starting from Error loading fee. Check the fee list .
Your parents and grandparents may be eligible to apply for a super visa which lets them stay in Canada for 5 years at a time.
Parents and grandparents visiting on a super visa can also apply for 2-year extensions to their stay while they’re still in Canada.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
